creator: moonlapse81@gmail.com
text:
for testing purposes i updated for latest HEAD of drm-kmod and ran for a day with
sway, which after some time resulted in kernel crash. Here is the debugger information:

Reading symbols from /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/CHAKLUNCHIK/kernel.full...

Unread portion of the kernel message buffer:
drmn0: GPU HANG: ecode 6:1:00000000, in sway [100963]
